title: Ad-free status mangement from your profile, heatmap spell filtering (aside from just Bloodlust) and server-side pull-connections

changes.change: The Patreon perk to give an ad-free status to others in Teams you are a member of can now be managed from your profile, in addition to from your team(s) directly.
Pull connections are now rendered server-side and as a result support full-pathfinding through the dungeon using floor switches. This now also includes Combined View (MDT-style).
Fixed a rare race condition when attempting to modify/delete pulls.
You can now filter on more than just Bloodlust - many cooldowns from all classes are now included.
